title: ATTRIBUTION.md
description: Schema for the ATTRIBUTION.md protocol — a machine-readable reciprocity convention for AI-mediated open source reuse.

repository.description: The repository identifier in owner/repo format. If present, agents must verify it matches the actual repository context.

license.description: The SPDX license identifier for the project.

actions.description: A list of requested reciprocity actions.

platform.description: The platform where the action applies.

mode.description: The consent mode. In v0.1, only suggest is supported.
